svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="pixkb-Pipeline" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-167" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="pixkb — Ingest → Index → Query → Eval Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="760" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sources" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Sources" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="260" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_iso" parent="sources" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="ISO 20022 spec
pacs.* · camt.*" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_pdf" parent="sources" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="PDF manual
(BACEN Pix manuals)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_md" parent="sources" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Markdown reference
(BACEN ID vocabulary)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_git" parent="sources" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Git mirror
(bacen repos)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s_oa" parent="sources" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="OpenAPI
(pix-api · pix-dict-api)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="20" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ingest" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Ingest
GatherAll → CrossLink" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="360" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="runner" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Epoch Runner
reconcile · git commit
prune embeddings" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="620" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bundle" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Canonical Bundle
kb-data/ (git)
OKF markdown — source of truth" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="900" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="index" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Postgres + pgvector
concept · embedding · edge · concept_fact
(derived, rebuildable)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="900" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="query" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Query — Hybrid
FTS (title-weighted, len-norm)
+ Vector (cosine KNN) → RRF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="900" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="judge" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Eval — Codex judge
cases → search → critique
relevance/precision → fix loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="540" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="sources" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="ingest" value="concepts"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ingest" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="runner" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="runner" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="bundle" value="write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="runner" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="index" value="upsert"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="bundle" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="index" value="reindex (rebuild from bundle)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="index" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="query" value="search"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="judge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="query" value="runs searches"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p_e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="judge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ingest" value="critique → fixes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
